themes.reasoning_notes: Bolster 2 puts +1/+1 counters on death, making it a modest counters support piece rather than a standalone payoff.
A 2/2 flier for four with death value can fit grindy creature decks, but its text points more strongly to counters support.
Bolster 2 always places two +1/+1 counters when it dies, making this a clean counters support card. It is not a dedicated payoff, and the body is too modest to justify extra themes.
